description: Configure the Chrome browser for digital web archiving. Remove the Netflix, Reddit, BuzzFeed, and Twitter/X bookmarks. Organize the 12 remaining bookmarks into four folders on the bookmark bar: 'Web Archives', 'Metadata Standards', 'Repositories', and 'Crawl Tools'. Enable the 'Save Page as MHTML' and 'Enable Reader Mode' features. Add a custom search engine named 'Wayback' with the shortcut 'ia' and URL 'https://web.archive.org/web/*/%s'. Set the default download directory to /home/ga/Documents/Web_Archives and ensure the browser asks where to save each file before downloading. Disable the preloading of pages to prevent false HTTP requests to target servers.
